title: docs(sprints): CI-RED-020 ledger reconcile — 020-A logged, 020-B (PR #177) recorded/merged
intent: SPRINTS.md ledger-only update to the CI-RED-020 index row. The row was stale (2026-06-15, pre-remediation): it did not record 020-A (shared readiness harness + diagnostic boot witness, MERGED #164 `fcf10905`; degraded-boot-200 follow-up closed via #168 `0daeab14`) and had no 020-B entry. This patch reconciles the row to the shipped lane state — 020-A logged, 020-B (restore the scheduled API Health + Smoke nightly witness) recorded and marked MERGED (PR #177, squash `b8ebc552`) — and reduces the remaining closure bar to the next scheduled `main` run being terminal-green. Documentation only; no product/application/CI-behavior change. This manifest itself is scoped to a docs branch off `main` (it replaces the inherited code manifest, which is not applicable to a ledger-only diff).

diff_articulation.what_changed: SPRINTS.md: the single CI-RED-020 index row is expanded from the stale 2026-06-15 stub to the reconciled lane state — (a) 020-A shared readiness harness + diagnostic boot witness logged as MERGED #164 (`fcf10905`), with the degraded-boot-200 follow-up closed via #168 (`0daeab14`); (b) 020-B (remove the `make api-verify` detour that starved the smoke step, split Pages into a downstream main-only `pages-deploy` job, step-timeout `cancelled`->named `failure`) recorded and marked MERGED (PR #177, squash `b8ebc552`), branch-witnessed pre-merge (dispatch runs `28648970970`/`28649149183`); (c) review follow-ups `6a3ba413` (witness gate parses `smoke_posts.json` + requires `ok`; `.nojekyll` guarantees a non-empty badges artifact so `pages-deploy` can't hard-fail) and `9414af45` (CBSP21 manifest reconciled to the shipped 3-min timeout) noted; (d) cross-link to the merge-instability handoff `docs/handoffs/PR_177_CI_RED_020B_MERGE_INSTABILITY_HANDOFF.md` (PR #181). Row stays OPEN: remaining closure bar = the next scheduled `main` run of API Health + Smoke must be terminal-green (a cancel after smoke succeeds is a Pages/env follow-up, not a 020-B relabel). .cbsp21/patch_input.json: replaced the inherited code manifest with this docs-ledger manifest declaring the ledger diff (SPRINTS.md), so the CBSP21 scope + coverage gates cover this PR.

commands_run: Markdown table row integrity: CI-RED-020 row has 6 pipes / 5 columns (ID|Title|Category|Status|last_verified); status stays OPEN.
local: python scripts/ci/check_cbsp21_patch_input.py --base origin/main --head HEAD -> PASS (SPRINTS.md now declared in scope).

files.intent: Reconcile the CI-RED-020 index row: log 020-A (MERGED #164), record 020-B (PR #177 MERGED `b8ebc552`), remaining closure bar = next scheduled main run terminal-green; cross-link the #181 merge-instability handoff.
